mapper.select: select preview_masking_enabled, error_line_masking_enabled, log_masking_enabled, content_encryption_enabled, encryption_key_ref, download_requires_approval, masking_rule_set from batch.file_template_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and template_code = #{templateCode} and enabled = true order by version desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_template_config ( tenant_id, template_code, template_name, template_type, biz_type, file_format_type, charset, target_charset, with_bom, line_separator, delimiter, quote_char, escape_char, record_length, header_rows, footer_rows, header_template, trailer_template, checksum_type, compress_type, encrypt_type, naming_rule, field_mappings, validation_rule_set, default_query_code, default_query_sql, query_param_schema, streaming_enabled, page_size, fetch_size, chunk_size, preview_masking_enabled, error_line_masking_enabled, log_masking_enabled, content_encryption_enabled, encryption_key_ref, download_requires_approval, masking_rule_set, enabled, version, description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{templateType}, #{bizType}, #{fileFormatType}, #{charset}, #{targetCharset}, #{withBom}, #{lineSeparator}, #{delimiter}, #{quoteChar}, #{escapeChar}, #{recordLength}, #{headerRows}, #{footerRows}, #{headerTemplateJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{trailerTemplateJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{checksumType}, #{compressType}, #{encryptType}, #{namingRule}, #{fieldMappingsJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{validationRuleSetJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{defaultQueryCode}, #{defaultQuerySql}, #{queryParamSchemaJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{streamingEnabled}, #{pageSize}, #{fetchSize}, #{chunkSize}, #{previewMaskingEnabled}, #{errorLineMaskingEnabled}, #{logMaskingEnabled}, #{contentEncryptionEnabled}, #{encryptionKeyRef}, #{downloadRequiresApproval}, #{maskingRuleSet}, #{enabled}, #{version}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, template_code, version) do update set template_name = excluded.template_name, template_type = excluded.template_type, biz_type = excluded.biz_type, file_format_type = excluded.file_format_type, charset = excluded.charset, target_charset = excluded.target_charset, with_bom = excluded.with_bom, line_separator = excluded.line_separator, delimiter = excluded.delimiter, quote_char = excluded.quote_char, escape_char = excluded.escape_char, record_length = excluded.record_length, header_rows = excluded.header_rows, footer_rows = excluded.footer_rows, header_template = excluded.header_template, trailer_template = excluded.trailer_template, checksum_type = excluded.checksum_type, compress_type = excluded.compress_type, encrypt_type = excluded.encrypt_type, naming_rule = excluded.naming_rule, field_mappings = excluded.field_mappings, validation_rule_set = excluded.validation_rule_set, default_query_code = excluded.default_query_code, default_query_sql = excluded.default_query_sql, query_param_schema = excluded.query_param_schema, streaming_enabled = excluded.streaming_enabled, page_size = excluded.page_size, fetch_size = excluded.fetch_size, chunk_size = excluded.chunk_size, preview_masking_enabled = excluded.preview_masking_enabled, error_line_masking_enabled = excluded.error_line_masking_enabled, log_masking_enabled = excluded.log_masking_enabled, content_encryption_enabled = excluded.content_encryption_enabled, encryption_key_ref = excluded.encryption_key_ref, download_requires_approval = excluded.download_requires_approval, masking_rule_set = excluded.masking_rule_set, enabled = excluded.enabled, description = excluded.description, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = current_timestamp
